task_description: Search for and compare major domestic cloud computing vendors, evaluating them across dimensions such as performance, pricing, security, and service support, then generate a vendor comparison report.
prompt: Please search for the latest product information and user reviews of major domestic cloud computing vendors in 2026 (Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, Huawei Cloud, CTYun, etc.), and conduct a comparative evaluation across the following dimensions: 1) Computing performance and availability; 2) Pricing structure and cost-effectiveness; 3) Security and compliance capabilities; 4) Technical support and service responsiveness. Please generate a detailed vendor comparison report with recommended rankings.
